reference: My eight-year-old daughter has been complaining of knee pain over the last seven days. The pain is intermittent. It usually surfaces when she is sitting on the toilet or on a certain type of hard chair, especially when she tries to stand up from a sitting position. Any suggestions as to what is causing this pain?
text: My eight-year-old daughter has been complaining of knee pain over the last seven days. The pain is intermittent. It usually surfaces when she is sitting on the toilet or on a certain hard chair, especially when she tries to stand up from a sitting position. Any suggestions as to what is causing this pain?
